teacher.login.title: Teacher login
teacher.login.desc: Use username {username} and your Firebase Auth password
teacher.login.firebaseWarning: Firebase is not configured — settings use local test mode (localStorage)
teacher.dashboard.title: Classroom control panel
teacher.status.title: Classroom status
teacher.status.desc: Toggle status then save — students see changes in real time
teacher.pretest.title: Pre-test settings
teacher.pretest.desc: Configure Pre-Test and intro music (Pre-Test only)
teacher.toggle.requirePretestDesc: Recommended to measure knowledge before lessons
teacher.toggle.musicIntroDesc: Students see a music intro before the Pre-Test quiz
teacher.toggle.requireFinishDesc: Start button unlocks when the song finishes
teacher.toggle.allowSkipDesc: Show skip button before song ends
teacher.classroom.title: Classroom info
teacher.classroom.htmlToggleDesc: Supports HTML links, images, and QR codes for students to scan
teacher.guide.title: Step-by-step teacher guide
teacher.guide.tipBody: Open /student alongside /teacher to see real-time results while teaching
teacher.guide.step2: Have students start Pre-Test and complete all 10 questions
teacher.guide.step3: Wait for students to finish the pre-test
teacher.guide.step4: Check classroom status in the control panel below
teacher.guide.step5: Unlock lessons when students should see content
teacher.guide.step6: Enable Post-Test when ready for the post-test
